title: Crispy Fermented Rice Cereal Crumble
description: A unique dessert made with fermented rice and crispy cereal crunch. Perfect for a sweet treat.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the cooked and cooled fermented rice, sugar, and crushed Krispies cereal.
Add in the unsalted butter and mix until the mixture is well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour and salt.
Add the flour mixture to the rice mixture and stir until everything is well coated.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and press it down firmly.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and crispy.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Top with juicy dried fruit and serve warm.
